meta.name: Ophis Unichain AllowList timelock migration (#442, chain 130)
meta.description: TEMPLATE — replace <GUARDIAN> and <TIMELOCK> with the deployed addresses (see timelock-governance-runbook.md) BEFORE importing into the Safe Transaction Builder. Two calls on the GPv2AllowListAuthentication proxy 0x1002E12f2e7f848b20fe572F92133E467a5D010C: (1) setManager(Guardian) while the Safe still controls it, then (2) transferOwnership(Timelock). Order matters. Tenderly-simulate before signing 2-of-3.
